import React from "react"; export default function Footer() { const socialLinks = { facebook: "https://www.facebook.com/share/1K1tDP2Vew/?mibextid=wwXIfr", instagram: "https://www.instagram.com/yassin_abdelkader/", youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/", github: "https://www.github.com/" }; const socialIcons = [ { name: "facebook", icon: "fab fa-facebook-f", color: "text-blue-600", hoverBg: "hover:bg-blue-600", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.facebook, }, { name: "instagram", icon: "fab fa-instagram", color: "text-pink-600", hoverBg: "hover:bg-gradient-to-tr hover:from-yellow-400 hover:via-pink-500 hover:to-purple-600", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.instagram, }, { name: "youtube", icon: "fab fa-youtube", color: "text-red-600", hoverBg: "hover:bg-red-600", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.youtube, }, { name: "github", icon: "fab fa-github", color: "text-gray-900", hoverBg: "hover:bg-gray-900", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.github, } ]; const footerLinks = [ { name: "À propos", href: "#about" }, { name: "Blog", href: "#blog" }, { name: "Services", href: "#services" }, { name: "Projets", href: "#projects" }, { name: "Contact", href: "#contact" } ]; return ( <>
{/* SVG Wave Decoration */}
